endpoints.name: Get Notes by orderId
endpoints.description: Retrieves notes related to a specific `orderId`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Retrieve Note
endpoints.description: Retrieves a given note in VTEX DO, filtering by `noteId`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{NOTEID}} with a real noteid.

endpoints.name: List tasks
endpoints.description:
This endpoint allows you to filter tasks. You can choose between the following filtering options: 

- **Assignees:** using `assignee.email` and `status`. Example: `https://{{accountName}}.{{environment}}.com.br/api/do/tasks?assignee.email={{person@email.com}}&status={{open}}`. 

- **Targets:** using `targetId` and `status`. Example: `https://{{accountName}}.{{environment}}.com.br/api/do/tasks?target.id={{name}}&status={{open}}`. 

- **Paged tasks:** using `page`, `perPage` and `status`. Example: `https://{{accountName}}.{{environment}}.com.br/api/do/tasks?page={{1}}&perPage={{10}}&status=;{{-Closed}}`. 

- **Context:** using `context`, `page`, `perPage` and `status`. Example: `https://{{accountName}}.{{environment}}.com.br/api/do/tasks?context={{context}}&page={{1}}&perPage={{10}}&status={{-Closed}}`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create Task
endpoints.description: Creates a new task in VTEX DO.

body.description: Ajudar na doc API para lancar no postman
body.name: pricing

endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Retrieve Task
endpoints.description: Retrieves a given task, filtering by `taskId`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid.

endpoints.name: Update Task
endpoints.description: Updates a given task's status, for example, filtering by `taskId`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid.

endpoints.name: Add Comment on a Task
endpoints.description: Adds a comment to a given task, filtering by `taskId`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid.
